description_cn: 刚体之间的碰撞检测，防止刚体相互穿透。支持弹性碰撞和摩擦。
description_en: Collision detection between rigid bodies, prevents interpenetration. Supports elastic collision and friction.

parameters.name: Restitution
parameters.desc_cn: 碰撞弹性，0为完全非弹性，1为完全弹性
parameters.desc_en: Collision restitution, 0 for inelastic, 1 for elastic

author: Kangaroo Team
